ns0:entry.ns0:title: Automattic/jetpack
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Automattic/jetpack
Language: php
Security, performance, marketing, and design tools — Jetpack is made by WordPress experts to make WP sites safer and faster, and help you grow your traffic.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ChurchCRM/CRM
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ChurchCRM/CRM
Language: php
ChurchCRM - A free and open-source Church Management Software (ChMS) to help churches manage their membership data, groups, events, and finances.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LycheeOrg/Lychee
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LycheeOrg/Lychee
Language: php
A great looking and easy-to-use photo-management-system you can run on your server, to manage and share photos.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PHPCSStandards/PHP_CodeSniffer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PHPCSStandards/PHP_CodeSniffer
Language: php
PHP_CodeSniffer tokenizes PHP files and detects violations of a defined set of coding standards.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PHPMailer/PHPMailer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PHPMailer/PHPMailer
Language: php
The classic email sending library for PHP

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PrivateBin/PrivateBin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PrivateBin/PrivateBin
Language: php
A minimalist, open source online pastebin where the server has zero knowledge of pasted data. Data is encrypted/decrypted in the browser using 256 bits AES.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM
Language: php
SuiteCRM - Open source CRM for the world

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/wordpress-develop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/wordpress-develop
Language: php
WordPress Develop, Git-ified. Synced from git://develop.git.wordpress.org/, including branches and tags! This repository is just a mirror of the WordPress subversion repository. Please include a link to a pre-existing ticket on https://core.trac.wordpress.org/ with every pull request.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cedar2025/Xboard
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cedar2025/Xboard
Language: php
High-performance panel based on V2board secondary development supporting new protocols and new features

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebook/facebook-for-woocommerce
Language: php
The official plugin from Meta. This repository is now officially maintained by Meta's engineering team. We welcome and encourage contributions from the community.
